violations.text: Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as cucumbers) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment to use dishwasher for WASHING ONLY. All equipment and utensils to be sanitized at the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024

Various items in the refrigeration units were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink and dishwasher. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024
